claims.text: Deep Reinforcement Learning offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking.
claims.source_quote: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking

claims.text: Deep Reinforcement Learning is particularly effective in adapting to unpredictable environmental conditions for autonomous underwater docking.

claims.text: Bridging the sim-to-real gap remains a significant bottleneck for practical deployment of DRL in underwater docking.
claims.source_quote: However, bridging the "sim-to-real" gap and managing high training latencies remain significant bottlenecks for practical deployment
